title: nectalisma natans
intro: Nectalisma natans, also known as Water Chestnut or Water Caltrop, is a floating aquatic plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Nectalisma natans include lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and treating digestive issues, as well as being used as a diuretic to relieve urinary problems. The herbal preparations of Nectalisma natans include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments in tropical regions.
